summary: VitalFlow v3.1 Iteration 12 - All features tested and verified. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Features verified: (1) classify_activity correctly detects exercise (BPM 130 + steps 12000 + steps_per_hour 800 = is_exercise=True), (2) calculate_sleep_recovery returns correct factors (5h sleep = factor 0.65, threshold < 100; 7.5h = factor 1.0, threshold 100), (3) fallback_analysis with exercise context returns V-Score >= 80 with 'Exercicio Saudavel' tag, (4) fallback_analysis without exercise (BPM 110 + sleep 5h) returns V-Score < 80 (stress detected), (5) /api/wearables/sync returns 404 when no tokens, (6) /api/analyze works with biometric input, (7) /api/health/trend includes medical_alert field, (8) Dashboard loads with status orb and gamification, (9) Real data card only shows when sync has real data (not visible without Google Fit tokens), (10) GestorDashboard sector filter works, (11) Deploy files exist (Dockerfile, render.yaml, docker-compose.yml).

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts sizing issue on initial render, does not affect functionality

backend_unit_tests: classify_activity(110, 500, 50) returns is_exercise=False (high BPM no steps = stress)
fallback_analysis with exercise context (BPM 130, steps 12000) returns V-Score >= 80
fallback_analysis without exercise (BPM 110, sleep 5h) returns V-Score < 80
fallback_analysis with low HRV (25ms) returns V-Score < 80
backend_api_tests: POST /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no tokens
POST /api/analyze returns 200 with v_score and status_visual
GET /api/history returns 200 with list of analyses
deploy_files_tests: Dockerfile exists at /app/Dockerfile with multi-stage build
render.yaml exists at /app/render.yaml with services config
frontend_tests: Admin login with admin@vitalflow.com / Admin123!@# succeeds
Real data card NOT visible (expected - no Google Fit tokens)
GestorDashboard loads with 'Painel do Gestor' title
Sector filter works - selecting TI filters data
Clear filter button ('Limpar') appears when sector selected
Period filter 7d button present and works
Period filter 30d button present and works
Period filter 6m button present and works

critical_code_review_comments: Exercise detection logic (classify_activity) correctly distinguishes exercise from stress based on steps_per_hour
Sleep recovery calculation (calculate_sleep_recovery) correctly adjusts BPM stress thresholds based on sleep hours
fallback_analysis properly integrates exercise context and sleep recovery for accurate V-Score calculation
Real data card (data-testid='real-data-card') correctly only shows when lastSyncData.has_real_data is true
Deploy files (Dockerfile, render.yaml, docker-compose.yml) are properly configured for production deployment
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow v3.1 Iteration 12 - All features verified. Key logic tested: (1) classify_activity in ai_service.py correctly detects exercise when steps_per_hour > 300 and BPM > 90, or steps_per_hour > 500, or steps > 8000 and BPM > 85. (2) calculate_sleep_recovery returns factor 0.5-1.0 based on sleep hours, with bpm_stress_threshold = 85 + (factor * 15). (3) fallback_analysis integrates both contexts - exercise context adds bonus to V-Score, sleep recovery adjusts stress thresholds. (4) Real data card on Dashboard only appears when Google Fit sync returns has_real_data=true. (5) Deploy files ready: Dockerfile (multi-stage), render.yaml (Render blueprint), docker-compose.yml (local dev). (6) Google Fit OAuth is configured (GOOGLE_FIT_CLIENT_ID/SECRET in .env) but requires real user authorization to get tokens.
mocked_apis: Google Fit requires real OAuth tokens - no mock data
